tabi:metadata.tabi:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: Inhere's Site - github
feed.subtitle: Inhere's site, blogs and project docs

entry.title: eget: install GitHub releases without waiting for a central index
entry.summary: The pace of command-line tooling has changed. New tools show up on GitHub every day, and active projects may publish several releases in a week, sometimes in a day. The slow part is often not the project itself. It is the central package index in the middle: a formula, bucket, manifest, or package definition that has not caught up yet. eget is for that gap. If the release asset already exists, or the download URL can be described by a simple rule, eget can fetch and install it directly. …
